target.label: Sweep prior `ATDD deferred` stories into `test-debt:` follow-ups

criteria.title: test-debt.md catalogue exists with one row per pre-bootstrap story carrying an ATDD-skip; each row records skip-ground + AC class + effort + risk class
substrate_evidence: _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/test-debt.md exists (35 244 bytes / 413 lines)
27 H3 anchors `### Story X-Y` per audit-deliverable count (10 Epic 1 + 17 Epic 2)
Per-row schema compliance: 5 fields per Subtask 2.2 schema (Skip ground / AC class skipped / Back-fill effort / Risk class / Source / Carry-to)
Story-id ordering: linear (1.2 → 2.18) per AC1 lock
OUT-of-scope omission: 7 stories listed under § Out-of-Scope (line 376)

criteria.title: FR14n amendment per issue #233 is in effect: bare ground-(b) ATDD-skips are flagged at bmad-create-story (args: 'review') pre-dev gate
substrate_evidence: _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/prd.md:968 carries the FR14n amendment per issue #233
6 grep-line matches for `FR14n.*amendment|issue #233|ground.*(b).*sunset|grandfather` at PRD lines 23, 948, 959, 968, 969, 1068
All 4 amendment clauses verified (ground b sunsets / post-bootstrap MUST cite a-or-c / bare-b insufficient / pre-bootstrap grandfathered)
Create-story workflow gate enforces via existing AC-coverage check; 32 cumulative post-bootstrap ATDD-skips have all cited ground (a) or (a)+(c) hybrid

criteria.title: Each test-debt entry is referenced from the originating story file's section (cross-link to test-debt.md anchor)
substrate_evidence: grep -l 'test-debt.md#story-' _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/*.md | wc -l returns 29 files
27 IN-SCOPE story files + Story 1.21 self-reference + test-debt.md self-reference = 29
27 operative back-pointers per AC3 lock (matches 27 IN-SCOPE H3 anchors in test-debt.md)
Anchor pattern compliance: kebab-case `test-debt.md#story-{epic}-{story}` per AC3 lock
Uniform `## Test Debt (post-Story-1.21 audit)` H2 trailer schema (NIT-deviation from create-story locked-text; uniform-suffix-append preferred for 27-file mechanical workload)
bash /tmp/add-backpointers.sh script with idempotent grep guard re-usable for future audit + sweep stories

criteria.title: Pre-bootstrap skips are grandfathered; only NEW skips post-Story 1.21 are subject to FR14n amendment
substrate_evidence: test-debt.md § Preamble landed at line 5 with three numbered purposes (Visibility / Prioritisation / Boundedness)
test-debt.md § Grandfather clause landed at line 45 (within § Preamble) — 'catalogue does NOT retroactively re-open the originating stories'
test-debt.md § Net-zero-bare-(b)-skip target landed within § Preamble — 'NO post-Story-1.21 story carries bare ground-(b) (no-runner)'
test-debt.md § Carry-to consumer contract (line 404) enumerates Epic 4 / 13 / 14 intended consumers
Originating story files byte-stable per Subtask 5.1 idempotent grep guard (only `## Test Debt` H2 trailer appended)

criteria.title: Inherited DEFER sweep — Stories 1.18 + 1.19 + 1.20 deferred-work.md entries are categorised in test-debt.md OR resolved in-flight OR explicitly carried forward to a NAMED follow-up story
substrate_evidence: 24 inherited DEFER ground-truth (deferred-work.md H2 sections at lines 805/812/822/831/842 — 4+7+6+4+3 = 24)
18 disposition (a) absorbed-into-test-debt → 6 Substrate-Wide Pattern cluster rows in `test-debt.md § Substrate-Wide Patterns` (line 296)
4 disposition (c) carried-forward-named → 4 sync-gate drifts (3 INV-git-hooks-preservation family + 1 INV-package-test-coverage-floor) → Epic 4 hardening
0 disposition (b) resolved-in-flight per worktree-only env constraint (option-a-resolve blocked in cc-devbox env)
2 cross-listings handled per Subtask 7.1 cluster-row absorption
Sync-gate baseline UNCHANGED: 4 inherited drifts at iter-401 dev-story = 4 inherited drifts at iter-399 SM-validate baseline (0 NEW drift introduced)
Per-DEFER checklist completeness: all 24 recorded in § Completion Notes with disposition + rationale (no DEFER silently slips per AC5 final clause)

criteria.title: iter-391 devbox-network whitelist gap formally captured + named target
substrate_evidence: test-debt.md § Substrate-Adjacent Operational Gaps section landed at line 356 (positioned AFTER per-story catalogue + Substrate-Wide Patterns per AC6 lock)
